title: pelargonium × robinsonii
intro: Pelargonium × robinsonii, also known as Cape Rose, is a hybrid species of the geranium family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pelargonium × robinsonii include relief from colds, fever, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Cape Rose include tea and tinctures, often used to treat various health conditions, although its effectiveness and safety should be further studied.
